source_note: Derived from the latest case-study figure script generate_case_study_figures.py, using Project AHP pipeline/outputs/accessibility_kelurahan.geojson 60-minute Scenario A/B fields and Getis-Ord Gi* on acc_mk_60.
getis_method: G_Local on Scenario B 60-minute score; KNN k=6; row-standardized weights; star=True; 999 permutations; seed=0; p_sim < 0.05 for 95% labels.
classification_method: Fixed breaks: <=20 Sangat Rendah, 20-40 Rendah, 40-60 Sedang, 60-80 Tinggi, 80-100 Sangat Tinggi.
